hypothesis_impacts.notes: Could reveal alteration zones via differential moisture retention, but signal may be subtle relative to spectral noise
Partially validated via thermal_20yr family. Incremental improvement expected, not transformative.
Highly speculative. Many confounders including vegetation phenology, precipitation patterns, land cover change.
Would be transformative for depth dimension. No free programmatic access exists.
Same as existing AEM blocker (Phase 32). Requires manual portal registration.
Regional only at available resolution. Not deposit-scale. GA Bouguer BLOCKED_BY_PORTAL.
Indirect link to mineralization. Probably insufficient to move canonical needle.
By definition, no impact on production. Documented for completeness only.

best_case_canonical.notes: Assumes all testable GEE hypotheses succeed. Depth unchanged because all depth sources BLOCKED.

realistic_canonical.basis: Historical empirical win rate ~40% of hypotheses. Phases 14, 25, 27 all showed neutral-to-negative results for frontier hypotheses.

bottleneck.reason: All deposit-scale depth sources are BLOCKED_BY_PORTAL or BLOCKED_BY_ACCESS. GA Bouguer gravity returns HTML portal page. GSWA/DMIRS AEM returns 403 Forbidden. USGS Earth MRI requires manual ScienceBase download. EMAG2v3 and WGM2012 are too coarse (4-10km) for deposit-scale discrimination.
bottleneck.unlock_path: Human operator manual download from portals: GA GADDS (gravity), DMIRS portal (AEM), ScienceBase (Earth MRI). Infrastructure is 100% ready — only data access is missing.

requirements: No data leakage confirmed (coverage parity check)

canonical_status.note: No production changes in Phase 29. Frontier research only. Canonical methodology frozen at v4.
